overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through the Arasaka Waterfront district. The player follows an NPC with an umbrella along wet streets, crosses an intersection with passing vehicles, and continues through a plaza with palm trees and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: following an NPC with an umbrella along the covered sidewalk next to a glass building

notable_agents.action: walking with a black umbrella along the sidewalk ahead of the player

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass panels and horizontal lines
tall digital advertising display showing animated pink and green graphics
black metal safety railing along the edge of the walkway
wet concrete pavement with visible rain reflections

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered waterfront sidewalk next to a modern glass building. Following an NPC carrying a black umbrella while passing a brightly lit digital advertising kiosk on the right. The area is sheltered from the rain with wet concrete underfoot reflecting the overhead lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic control and crosswalks

events.description: exits covered walkway and approaches open intersection with visible sky
large industrial truck passes through the intersection from left to right
begins crossing the wet street after the truck passes

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner for traffic to clear, then crossing the intersection

notable_agents.action: large dark truck driving through the intersection
crossing the street with an umbrella and continuing ahead

entered.detail: wet asphalt crosswalk with red and white striped markings
tall black pole with traffic signals and yellow-black striped base
low-rise building with red facade and white panel sections

segments.scene_description: Reaching the end of the covered walkway, the scene opens to a rainy intersection. The player waits as a large truck passes through, then crosses the wet asphalt crosswalk while the NPC with the umbrella continues ahead and exits view. A red industrial building becomes visible across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront street with construction barriers and graffiti walls

events.description: red sports car speeds through the intersection in the background
Arasaka Waterfront location text appears on the left side of screen

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront street past construction barriers and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the distant intersection

entered.detail: concrete and metal barriers with red and white striped patterns lining the street
wall covered in colorful graffiti art behind the barriers

segments.scene_description: Walking along the Arasaka Waterfront street with construction barriers and graffiti-covered walls on the right. The area is quiet with minimal activity. A red sports car speeds through the distant intersection as the player continues along the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and reflecting pools

events.description: lighting shifts to warmer orange tones from sodium street lamps
approaches parked black van and modern building entrance with glass facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area observing the palm trees and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: black van parked along the plaza curb near the building entrance

entered.detail: tall palm trees with orange lighting illuminating their fronds
large black utility van parked on the tiled plaza surface
contemporary building with large glass windows and green neon interior lighting
shallow water feature reflecting the orange street lights and palm trees

segments.scene_description: Entering a spacious plaza lined with palm trees and illuminated by warm orange sodium street lights. The ground transitions to tiled pavement with reflecting pools. A black van is parked near a modern glass building entrance as the player continues through the atmospheric open area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban district that transitions from a sheltered waterfront walkway into an expansive, neon-lit plaza. It begins by following an NPC with a black umbrella along a covered sidewalk beside a glass building, passing a brightly lit digital kiosk. As the walkway ends, the scene opens to a rainy intersection where the camera waits for a large truck to pass before crossing the wet asphalt toward a red industrial building. The path then shifts along a quiet street lined with construction barriers and graffiti-covered walls, catching a glimpse of a red sports car speeding through a distant intersection. Finally, the environment expands into a spacious plaza where the pavement turns to reflective tiles beneath palm trees and warm orange sodium lights, passing a parked black van near a modern glass entrance.
